# Counter exposed as a family name WITHOUT the `_total` suffix (some
# prometheus clients / OpenMetrics writers do this). The scraper must still
# find it via the non-suffixed lookup fallback.
# HELP vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc KV cache usage.
# TYPE vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc gauge
vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc{model_name="m"} 0.30
# HELP vllm:prefix_cache_hits Counter of cached blocks reused.
# TYPE vllm:prefix_cache_hits counter
vllm:prefix_cache_hits{model_name="m"} 10
# HELP vllm:prefix_cache_queries Counter of prefix cache queries.
# TYPE vllm:prefix_cache_queries counter
vllm:prefix_cache_queries{model_name="m"} 20
# HELP vllm:num_requests_running Number of requests currently running.
# TYPE vllm:num_requests_running gauge
vllm:num_requests_running{model_name="m"} 2
# HELP vllm:num_requests_waiting Number of requests waiting to be processed.
# TYPE vllm:num_requests_waiting gauge
vllm:num_requests_waiting{model_name="m"} 0
